form.formComment: Racing well. Last outing finished second of 13 starters at Musselburgh on March 20 over 4800m, 3.5 len behind Bollin Matilda carrying 70kg at $2.50. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished second of 12 starters at Sedgefield on February 19 over 4000m, on slow going 8 len behind Thank You Blue with 75.5kg at $3.30. Fought on last time. Ideally placed for a return to winning form.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth of 7 runners at this track on April 4 over 5300m, 16 len behind Top Guy with 70.5kg at $17. form.formComment: Comes off a 39 day let-up. Last start finished fifth of 7 runners at Exeter on March 6 over 4600m, 37 len behind Harry Junior carrying 74kg at $7.50. Before that settled back and ran on when finished seventh of 11 starters at Ludlow on January 15 over 4200m, 66 len behind Mondoui'boy with 74.5kg at $19. Will be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 38 days. Last start finished second in a small field at Hereford on March 7 over 5100m, a head behind Jack The Savage with 76kg at $3.30. The start before that; finished second in a small field at Lingfield on February 5 over 4600m, on rain affected going; 5 len behind Atlantic Power with 74kg at $5.50. Best jumps form stacks up.

form.formComment: Useful type. Last run finished fifth of 9 starters at Chepstow on March 26 over 6100m, 16 len behind Handin Manypockets carrying 65kg at $3.30. Race before favourite; won by 2.25 len Exeter on March 6 over 4800m defeating Ted The Thief carrying 67kg at $5 in a steeplechase. Bold showing expected.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after two months finished ninth of 18 runners at Exeter on March 17 over 4620m, 28 len behind Local Derby carrying 64.5kg at $41. Previously second-up finished ninth of 16 starters at Taunton on December 11 over 4800m, 15 len behind Alright Dai carrying 66kg at $67. Can't see him turning things around enough today.
